_meta.title: Lok Adalat statistics
_meta.source: National Legal Services Authority (NALSA) — National Lok Adalat disposal reports
_meta.summary: National Lok Adalat case and settlement figures, extracted from official NALSA disposal PDFs. Internally arithmetic-verified (pre-litigation + pending = total).
_meta.policy: Values copied from official NALSA disposal PDFs (saved under knowledge/sources/nalsa/). Pre-litigation + pending columns sum to the total column — verified. Settlement amounts are in rupees (absolute) as printed.
_meta.note: For 14.03.2026: Delhi organized its NLA on 22-03-2026 and West Bengal postponed, so those are not fully reflected in this date's grand total (per the report's own note).

records.notes: Grand Total ≈ Rs 23,779.21 crore. Pre-litigation (78,214,367,039) + pending (159,577,692,560) = 237,792,059,599 (verified).
